title: Images fixture
preview: Three images: data: URI, https URL, and wide-aspect — all with alt text.

content.value: This fixture exercises the image block across three source types. Every image carries alt text so the validator's image-alt rule is satisfied.
A 1x1 transparent PNG encoded as a data URI. Useful for placeholders and email-friendly inline assets.

blocks.alt: 1 by 1 transparent pixel encoded as a PNG data URI

content.value: The pixel is intentionally invisible — the assertion is that the renderer accepts the data URI source.
A generic placeholder served over https. Renderers fetch it; sandbox tests can mock the response.

blocks.alt: Generic 600 by 400 placeholder image fetched over https

content.value: Width and height are declared so layout can reserve space before the bytes arrive.
An image whose width-to-height ratio exceeds 2:1. Layout code that special-cases banners should treat this differently from the square-ish images above.

blocks.alt: Wide banner placeholder, 1600 by 400, aspect ratio 4 to 1

content.value: Aspect ratio is 4:1 — well past the 2:1 threshold this fixture promises.
